name: Time Spiral Remastered

draft.notes: 15-card pack: 10 commons, 3 uncommons, 1 rare, 1 timeshifted card, plus an ad card. The timeshifted slot is an old-border reprint. If a foil appears it displaces a common and comes after the timeshifted card. Marketing/ad cards all carry a token on the front face but are non-collectible.

sourceNotes: Extra-large remastered set with 121 'timeshifted' old-border reprints occupying a dedicated slot in every pack. 36 packs per box. Printed in English in the USA; figures from US Pack Anatomy.
